rag_rules: Generate assume/guarantee clauses only for visible features or constants explicitly provided in the requirement context.
Place assume/guarantee/eq/const declarations in component type annexes when they describe interface behavior, not implementation details.
generic_rules: Use named constants to represent thresholds or bounds instead of hard-coded literals.
Express logical relationships using boolean operators on visible ports or defined constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Assumptions and guarantees require quoted labels: `assume "label": expr;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without intermediate variables or outputs.
